assertions.rationale: Uses 'INameIdGenerator' instead of the correct 'ISamlNameIdGenerator' interface.

assertions.assertion: The GenerateAsync method receives a NameIdGenerationContext with Subject claims
assertions.rationale: Method signature returns Task<string> instead of Task<NameIdGenerationResult>, and uses context.User instead of context.Subject.

assertions.assertion: Extracts the employee_id claim from context.Subject
Returns NameIdGenerationResult.Success with a NameId containing the employee_id value
assertions.rationale: Returns a plain string, not NameIdGenerationResult.Success with a NameId.

assertions.assertion: Handles the missing claim case with NameIdGenerationResult.Failure
assertions.rationale: Throws an exception instead of returning NameIdGenerationResult.Failure.
